name: product-detail-images
description: Generate source-faithful product detail image sets for ecommerce and B2B product pages.

interface.shortDescription: Generate faithful ecommerce detail image sets
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that helps create ordered product detail image sets from confirmed product facts and real product reference photos. It emphasizes source-faithful visuals, appearance locking, clear feature slides, and avoiding invented product structures or unsupported marketing claims.
defaultPrompt: Create product detail images for this product URL.
Use this product brief and photos to make a 5-image set.
